uiBuilder.label: Data Table
uiBuilder.description: A configurable record list: give it a table name and an encoded query and it loads the matching records over the Table API and renders them in a paginated, OOTB-style table. Columns, a status pill, and per-row Edit / Duplicate / Delete actions are configurable. Emits ROW_CLICK plus EDIT/COPY/DELETE_ACTION events (each with the record sys_id) for the page to bind.

properties.name: table
properties.label: Table
properties.description: Table to query, e.g. "task" or "incident". The Columns / Status / Sort pickers below list this table's fields (and dot-walk into reference fields).

properties.name: query
properties.label: Fixed filter
properties.description: Condition that filters which records are shown (built with the condition editor, stored as an encoded query). Leave blank for all records.

properties.name: orderBy
properties.label: Sort by field
properties.description: Field to sort the records by. Use "Sort descending" to reverse the order.

properties.name: orderDescending
properties.label: Sort descending
properties.description: When on, sorts the chosen Sort field in descending order.

properties.name: fields
properties.label: Columns
properties.description: Fields to show as columns, in order. Add reference fields and dot-walk into them (e.g. caller_id.name). Leave empty to show every returned field. Stored as a comma-separated field list.

properties.name: labels
properties.label: Column headers (override)
properties.description: Optional comma-separated header labels matching the Columns order, e.g. "Product Name,Version,Status". Blank entries fall back to the field's prettified name.

properties.name: statusField
properties.label: Status field
properties.description: Field rendered as a colored status pill (Draft / Published / Archived, etc.). Leave blank to render it as plain text.

properties.name: pageSize
properties.label: Rows per page
properties.description: Default number of rows fetched and shown per page. Pages load lazily from the server on demand (sysparm_limit + sysparm_offset). Users can change this at runtime via the per-page selector.

properties.name: showPageSizeControl
properties.label: Show per-page selector
properties.description: When on, the footer shows a 'Per page' dropdown so the user can change how many rows are shown per page.

properties.name: pageSizes
properties.label: Per-page options
properties.description: Comma-separated page-size choices offered in the per-page selector, e.g. "5,10,20,50,100".

properties.name: pageSizeLabel
properties.label: Per-page label
properties.description: Label shown next to the per-page selector.

properties.name: heading
properties.label: Heading
properties.description: Optional title shown above the table. Leave blank to hide.

properties.name: itemLabel
properties.label: Item label
properties.description: Noun used in the footer count, e.g. "products" → "Showing 1-5 of 5 products".

properties.name: showActions
properties.label: Show actions column
properties.description: When on, shows the per-row action icons column.

properties.name: showEdit
properties.label: Show Edit action
properties.description: Show the edit (pencil) action icon.

properties.name: showCopy
properties.label: Show Duplicate action
properties.description: Show the duplicate (copy) action icon.

properties.name: showDelete
properties.label: Show Delete action
properties.description: Show the delete (trash) action icon.

properties.name: actionsLabel
properties.label: Actions header
properties.description: Header text for the actions column.

properties.name: editIcon
properties.label: Edit icon
properties.description: now-icon name for the edit action.

properties.name: copyIcon
properties.label: Duplicate icon
properties.description: now-icon name for the duplicate action.

properties.name: deleteIcon
properties.label: Delete icon
properties.description: now-icon name for the delete action.

properties.name: prettyDates
properties.label: Pretty dates
properties.description: When on, values that look like dates are formatted as "Mon D, YYYY" (e.g. May 1, 2026).

properties.name: emptyMessage
properties.label: Empty message
properties.description: Text shown when no records match the query.

actions.name: ROW_CLICK
actions.label: Row clicked
actions.description: Fired when a table row body is clicked. Payload: { sysId, table }.

actions.name: EDIT_ACTION
actions.label: Edit clicked
actions.description: Fired when the edit (pencil) icon is clicked. Payload: { sysId, table }.

payload.name: sysId
payload.label: Record sys_id
payload.description: sys_id of the record to edit.

actions.name: COPY_ACTION
actions.label: Duplicate clicked
actions.description: Fired when the duplicate (copy) icon is clicked. Payload: { sysId, table }.

payload.name: sysId
payload.label: Record sys_id
payload.description: sys_id of the record to duplicate.

actions.name: DELETE_ACTION
actions.label: Delete clicked
actions.description: Fired when the delete (trash) icon is clicked. Payload: { sysId, table }.

payload.name: sysId
payload.label: Record sys_id
payload.description: sys_id of the record to delete.
